name: Diwali Sales Analysis
description: An end-to-end EDA identifying consumer behavior and sales trends during India's largest festive season. Analyzed demographics and purchasing power to provide inventory optimization insights.

name: Zomato Data Analysis
description: Explored restaurant performance and customer preferences across various cities. Analyzed rating distributions, price ranges, and cuisine popularity to understand the food-tech ecosystem.

name: Telecom Churn Analysis
description: Investigated customer attrition patterns in the telecommunications industry. Identified key drivers of churn such as contract types and monthly charges to improve retention strategies.

name: Bank Churn Insights
description: Analyzed credit card customer data to predict attrition. Focused on financial behaviors like revolving balances and transaction counts to segment high-risk customers.

name: Used Car Price Analysis
description: A comprehensive study on vehicle depreciation. Identified how mileage, fuel type, and brand impact resale value, providing a data-driven approach to car valuation.

name: E-Commerce Churn EDA
description: Deep-dive into online retail customer behavior. Analyzed login patterns, device usage, and satisfaction scores to pinpoint why customers stop shopping on the platform.

name: Loan Prediction Analysis
description: Evaluated risk factors for loan applicants. This EDA focuses on identifying the correlation between income, credit history, and loan approval status.

name: Facebook Thailand Engagement
description: Analyzed social media engagement patterns in the Thai market. Studied reaction types and post timing to determine what drives maximum interaction on Facebook.
